title: ZXPong
shortDescription: Inspired by the classic 1970s arcade paddle game.
description: ZXPong is a retro-inspired arcade paddle game featuring fast paced rallies, AI opponents, local multiplayer, online multiplayer, unlockable cosmetics, achievements, and classic retro visuals inspired by the golden age of arcade gaming.
features: BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic unlocks

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic items across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned through gameplay only.
